emailDelivery.failureReason: SendPulse credentials not configured in environment (SENDPULSE_API_USER_ID / SENDPULSE_USER_ID / SENDPULSE_API_USER and SENDPULSE_API_SECRET / SENDPULSE_SECRET all unset); sendpulse-api npm module not installed (node_modules absent) so server/lib/emailService.ts cannot be invoked from sandbox
